(1)192.168.xx.3:6801 error-101 ~~~ From Upstream Tracker: ~~~ 1) Mount CephFS on client 2) Shutdown a node containing an OSD+MON or somehow make that node unreachable 3) While client is accessing the mount(simple ls on directory), reboot the CephFS client node 4) Observe the client node will be stuck forever until it can reach the Ceph nodes or unless hard reset is done ~~~
publishedTitle: OCS/ODF: Linux shutdown / reboot hangs due to CephFS kernel client, "libceph: connect (1)192.168.xx.76:6801 error -101"
